steps.title: Combine like absolute-value terms
steps.content: Both terms contain $|4-x|$, so combine their coefficients: $$2|4-x|+3|4-x|=5|4-x|.$$ The equation becomes $$5|4-x|=25.$$

steps.title: Split the absolute value
steps.content: Divide by $5$ to get $|4-x|=5$. That means $$4-x=5$$ or $$4-x=-5.$$ These give $x=-1$ and $x=9$.

steps.title: Choose the requested solution
steps.content: The question asks for the positive solution, so keep $x=9$ and reject $x=-1$. The answer is 9.
